title: centaurium pauciflorum
intro: Centaurium pauciflorum, also known as the lesser centaury, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurium pauciflorum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Centaurium pauciflorum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or in the form of capsules or tinctures, allowing for a variety of uses in traditional and modern herbal medicine.
